context: Tests whether the response correctly maps application types to appropriate OAuth2 flows.

checklist.name: Server-side app: Authorization Code flow
checklist.description: Recommends Authorization Code flow (with client secret) for the server-side web app since it can securely store the client secret

checklist.name: SPA: Authorization Code with PKCE
checklist.description: Recommends Authorization Code flow with PKCE for the SPA since it cannot store a client secret (NOT the deprecated Implicit flow)

checklist.name: CLI: Device Authorization flow
checklist.description: Recommends Device Authorization flow (or Authorization Code with localhost redirect) for the CLI tool

checklist.name: Explains security rationale
checklist.description: Explains why different flows exist: client secret confidentiality, redirect URI validation, token exposure in browser

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: OAuth2 flow names, mechanics, and security properties are technically correct
